## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Contribution tier

- [ ] Tier 1: Skill (new domain skill or skill improvement)
- [ ] Tier 2: Documentation
- [ ] Tier 3: Core (evolve engine, contracts, safety)

## Checklist

- [ ] All files written in English
- [ ] No secrets or tokens in committed files
- [ ] No `git add -A` or `git add .` used
- [ ] Skill changes include HALT file check
- [ ] Contract fields match `agent/contracts/schema.md`
- [ ] Tested with `/evolve --dry-run` (if applicable)
